product_name: Avon "Hip Hop Harry" Animated Easter Bunny — Singing & Jumping Plush in Denim Overalls (2002, tested & working)
attributes: Avon "Hip Hop Harry" • made by T.L. Toys (Taiwan) for Avon • © Avon 2002 (Reg. No. PA-2346 TW) • white plush bunny, ~15" • red cap + yellow "HIP HOP" sweatshirt + denim overalls + red high-top sneakers • red "PRESS HERE" tab on right cuff — sings & jumps (head moves) • 4 AA batteries • FUNCTION TESTED & WORKING
condition: Pre-owned, good display condition; mechanism TESTED & WORKING
condition_notes: Avon "Hip Hop Harry" animated Easter bunny — a white plush rabbit in a red cap, yellow "HIP HOP" sweatshirt, denim overalls, and red high-top sneakers, with a red "PRESS HERE" tab on the right cuff. Maker CONFIRMED by the sewn-in tag: AVON Products, Inc., © Avon 2002, Reg. No. PA-2346(TW) — manufactured by T.L. Toys in Taiwan (NOT Gemmy; earlier attribution corrected). FUNCTION TESTED & WORKING — pressing the tab plays the song and the bunny jumps with its head moving. Runs on 4 AA batteries (not included). The handwritten retail price sticker that had been on the shirt has been REMOVED. One honest condition note: a faint dark scuff/smudge on the yellow shirt just below the logo (visible in the detail photo); the plush is otherwise clean and bright with no other obvious damage. Seasonal (Easter) item being prepped off-season (June).

square.note: 2026-06-21 reconcile: maker CORRECTED to Avon 'Hip Hop Harry' (2002, T.L. Toys TW) per sewn-in tag — was wrongly 'likely Gemmy'. Repriced $28 -> $18 (common Avon item; working comps ~$15 item + ~$13 ship). New matted hero + back + maker-tag + condition photos. Price sticker removed; faint shirt scuff noted.
